sections.question_synthetic: Whether ACHD (Association of California Hospital Districts) and its wholly-owned subsidiary AICO (ACHD Insurance Company) are prohibited from making political contributions under Government Code section 85300, and if not, what contribution limits would apply to each entity.
sections.parsing_notes: Format: ocr; LLM: This is an incoming request letter, not an FPPC response/advice letter. The document contains three questions but no conclusion or short answer section from FPPC. The document ID 90026 suggests this may be part of a file that includes the FPPC's response, but that response is not present in this extract. Includes substantial background material and corporate bylaws that are peripheral to the legal question. OCR quality is moderate with some character recognition errors.

Question Three: If either ACHD or AICO can make political contributions, what limits would apply to both or either of them?
